top_signals.title: Traders Pare ECB Rate Bets to Below Quarter-Point Hike in 2026
top_signals.summary: Traders are reappraising the scope for the European Central Bank to lift interest rates as sliding oil prices reduce risks of sticky inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Designing Drones for Africa
top_signals.summary:
This exclusive Cogs of War interview is with Maxwell Maduka, the co-founder and chief engineer of Terra Industries, an African defense technology company building autonomous drone and counter-drone systems designed for the continent’s operating conditions. As cheap imported airframes flood African markets and non-state actors employ drones across the Sahel, we asked Max why Terra is betting on Africa building its own defense industrial base.Cheap Turkish and Chinese drones and sensor systems have proliferated across Africa for years. Where do those systems fall short, and what capabilities do you hope to add to the crowded unmanned market?Imported Turkish and Chinese

The post Designing Drones for Africa appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Asset management giant Invesco files for tokenized fund targeting stablecoin reserve market
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
top_signals.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Stellantis and Nissan in talks to buy assets from troubled Marelli
top_signals.summary: Marelli is going through a complex and lengthy restructuring process after filing for Chapter 11 bankruptcy one year ago.
